title: cicca virens
intro: Cicca virens, also known as the lemongrass senna or wild senna, is a plant species native to India and other parts of Asia. It is a shrub-like plant with yellow flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve constipation. The plant's leaves and pods are used to prepare herbal remedies that have been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. Cicca virens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions due to its emmenagogue and purgative properties.
